articles.title: Kullu: Tourists Enjoy at Beas River Amid Scorching Heat #Gallery - Social News XYZ

articles.full_text:
Kullu: Tourists enjoy a rafting ride at the Beas River as they flock to Manali for relief from the scorching heat in Manali, Kullu district of Himachal Pradesh, on Tuesday, May 12, 2026. (Photo: IANS)
